0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"AAAK Compression"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Adaptive Associative Abstraction Kernel (AAAK) is Mnemosyne's context compression algorithm. It reduces token count while preserving semantic meaning."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"The Problem"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent context windows are limited (4K–128K tokens). Raw memory dumps consume precious space. AAAK compresses related memories into concise summaries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"How AAAK Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Cluster"}],": Group related memories by vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Abstract"}],": Generate a summary that captures the cluster's essence"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Associate"}],": Link the summary to original entries for drill-down"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Kernel"}],": Store as a dense \"memory kernel\" for efficient retrieval"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Compression Ratios"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Content Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Raw Tokens"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Compressed"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Ratio"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Conversation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"200"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"10:1"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Documentation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"400"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12:1"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Code content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"3,000"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"350"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8:1"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Using AAAK"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Automatic compression during sleep\nmem = Memory(aaak_enabled=True)\n\n# Manual compression\ncompressed = mem.compress(memories, target_tokens=500)\n\n# Decompress for detail\noriginals = mem.expand(compressed.kernel_id)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_enabled"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"True"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable automatic compression"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"aaak_target_ratio"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"8.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Target compression memories to form a Critical facts should be stored in Semantic Memory (which is not compressed) or marked with high importance to avoid consolidation."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/03grble4o35rv.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"W2wn9FU9aq0UpyltNqJVA"}
